variants.title: Milwaukee 48-11-1852 M18™ REDLITHIUM™ XC5.0 Extended Capacity Battery Two Pack

description.plain: Delivers up to 2.5X more run-time, 20% more power and 2X more life than standard lithium-ion batteries. The M18™ REDLITHIUM™ XC 5.0 Extended Capacity Battery Pack features superior pack construction, electronics, and performance to deliver more work per charge and more work over the life of the pack when compared to competitors. The M18™ REDLITHIUM™ XC 5.0 Battery features an advanced design, protecting the pack against harsh jobsite environments. This protection routes water away from the electronics and out of the battery pack, extends run-time and life by minimizing heat, and prevents pack failures from vibration or drops. This unique to Milwaukee® design also allows the battery to operate in extreme cold weather conditions (below OoF/-18oC). Managed by Milwaukee’s exclusive REDLINK™ Intelligence, the battery features overload protection to prevent you from damaging your cordless power tools in heavy-duty situations, while the discharge protection prevents cell damage. It also provides full system compatibility with 60+ M18™ cordless solutions.Upgrade to the M18™ REDLITHIUM™ XC 5.0 Battery Pack to instantly increase the run-time and durability of your M18™ cordless tools. WARNING: Cancer & Reproductive harm www.P65Warnings.ca.gov

description.plain: The Milwaukee 48-11-1852 M18 REDLITHIUM™ XC5.0 Battery Two-Pack delivers extended runtime and power for demanding M18 tools—up to 2.5x more runtime than standard CP batteries with superior pack construction for jobsite durability. REDLINK™ Intelligence protects against overloads, overheating, and over-discharge, while the onboard fuel gauge shows remaining charge at a glance. Impact-resistant housing and rubber overmold withstand drops and abuse, powering 300+ M18 tools with fade-free performance in extreme temperatures. Stock up with this 2-pack value—your essential for saws, drills, impacts, and lights that run longer and harder. • 5.0Ah extended capacity – up to 2.5x more runtime than standard CP batteries • REDLINK™ Intelligence – overload/overheat/over-discharge protection • Onboard fuel gauge – displays remaining charge for planning • Impact-resistant housing – rubber overmold for drops & abuse • Fade-free power – consistent performance in extreme conditions • Compatible with 300+ M18 tools – full M18 system integration • 2-pack value – stock up for crews or heavy jobsite use • 3-year warranty – Milwaukee reliability you trust • FREE Shipping!

variants.title: Milwaukee M18 REDLITHIUM XC 5.0 Extended Capacity Battery 2-Pack 48-11-1852

description.plain: EXTENDED-RANGE JOB SITE PRODUCTIVITY Maximizing your fleet's ROI requires energy sources that can withstand high-cycle fatigue and extreme environmental stressors without compromising discharge consistency. These Milwaukee M18 REDLITHIUM XC 5.0 battery packs are engineered with a dedicated internal structure that separates and protects cells, preventing the heat-related degradation common in standard lithium-ion platforms. By integrating advanced thermal management and shock-responsive separators, these units deliver the stable voltage required for high-torque applications while maintaining the integrity of the 18V system over thousands of charges. / High-Efficiency Cell Balancing ensures even charging and discharging for maximum pack life / REDLINK Intelligence communicates with tools to prevent over-drain and thermal runaway / Rugged shock-absorbing frame protects internal components from drops and vibration / Integrated fuel gauge provides instantaneous energy status to minimize workspace downtime / Water routing design directs moisture away from electronic boards to survive job site rain TECHNICAL SPECIFICATIONS Voltage: 18V Amp Hour: 5.0 Ah Battery Chemistry: REDLITHIUM Lithium-Ion System Compatibility: M18 Cordless System Cold Weather Operation: Down to 0°F (-18°C) WHAT'S IN THE BOX / (2) M18 REDLITHIUM XC 5.0 Extended Capacity Battery Packs (48-11-1852)

description.plain: DETAILS: INCLUDES: • (2) M12 REDLITHIUM™ HIGH OUTPUT™ XC5.0 Battery Pack • (1) 48-11-2450 M12 REDLITHIUM HIGH OUTPUT XC5.0 Battery Pack FEATURES: • Delivers 25% more power and runs 25% cooler • Provides 25% more runtime • Versatility: Powers all 125+ M12™ cordless solutions • REDLINK™ Intelligence: Our battery circuitry provides optimized performance and overload protection using total system communication between tool, battery and charger • Best-in-class construction: Resistant housing designed to provide increased protection against exposure to common oils, greases, and solvents • All-weather performance: Delivers fade free power in extreme jobsite conditions • 3 Year Warranty SPECIFICATIONS: • Amp-hour: 5.0 • Battery Chemistry: Lithium Ion • Battery Package Count: 1 • Battery Voltage: 12V • Color/Finish: Black, Red • Compatibility: Milwaukee M12 Tools • Housing Material: Plastic • Rechargeable: Yes • Battery Weight (lbs): 0.95 • Manufacturer Warranty: 3 Years The MILWAUKEE M12 REDLITHIUM™ HIGH OUTPUT™ XC5.0 Battery Pack delivers 25% more power and runs 25% cooler than other Milwaukee M12 REDLITHIUM™ XC battery packs. The increase in power elevates the performance of the entire MILWAUKEE® M12™ system and drives the next breakthrough in M12 FUEL™. The lithium-ion battery delivers fade-free power and runs substantially cooler through demanding applications, allowing you to push your cordless power tools throughout a wide range of applications. Each battery pack is built for heavy-duty use, runs cooler, and performs in climates below 0°F/-18°C. In addition, the M12 REDLITHIUM™ HIGH OUTPUT™ XC5.0 is built with a resistant housing, increasing the protection against exposure to common oils, greases, and solvents found in transportation maintenance and manufacturing environments. The M12 REDLITHIUM™ HIGH OUTPUT™ XC5.0 is fully compatible with 125+ M12™ solutions.

metadata.top_features:
Sealed, spill-proof and leak-resistant design ensures long-term reliability and safety
Advanced AGM technology provides consistent power and durability in harsh conditions
Superior cold cranking amps (CCA) deliver strong starting power in cold weather
Engineered to withstand high vibration and extreme temperatures for extended lifespan
Competitive pricing with extended shelf life and 18-month free replacement warranty

products.title: 12 Volt 5 Ah Battery for the Razor MX125 Dirt Rocket

description.plain: A sealed, maintenance-free 12V 5Ah battery designed for reliable power and easy installation in the Razor MX125 Dirt Rocket.

unique_selling_points: Non-spillable, sealed lead acid battery with explosion-proof installation and deep discharge recovery for the Razor MX125 Dirt Rocket.
metadata.top_features:
Sealed and maintenance-free operation ensures hassle-free replacement and long-term reliability
Non-spillable design enhances safety during installation and use
Safety valve and explosion-proof installation provide added protection
Exceptional deep discharge recovery performance maintains battery health
Flexible design allows multiple installation positions for user convenience
metadata.tech_specs:
Voltage: 12 V
Capacity: 5 Ah
Battery Type: Sealed lead acid (SLA)
Color: Black
Manufacturer Type: Aftermarket
Warranty: 1 year

media.alt_text: 12 Volt 5 Ah Battery for the Razor MX125 Dirt Rocket with visible red and white wires, close-up views of connectors, and a compact, sealed black box design.

variants.title: 12 Volt 5 Ah Battery for the Razor MX125 Dirt Rocket

description.plain: If the original battery on your Razor refuse to hold a charge, then Monster Scooter Parts is here to help. We offer this superb little 12 volt 5 Ah battery pack for the Razor MX125 Dirt Rocket to get that little dirt bike running its best. Sealed and maintenance-free operation. Non-spillable design Safety valve explosion-proof installation. High quality and reliability Exceptional deep discharge recovery performance Low self-discharge characteristic. Flexible design for multiple installation positions. Why buy replacement Razor batteries from Monster Scooter Parts? Monster Scooter Parts sells high quality sealed lead acid (SLA) batteries at affordable prices. Our battery packs use batteries from Universal Power Group (UPG), a leading supplier of battery and power related products in the United States for over 40 years. Based in Coppell, TX, UPG provides the OEM sealed lead batteries in critical applications such as medical mobility devices and equipment. If these batteries can meet the high standards set by the medical equipment manufacturers, you can be assured that they are of a higher quality than the batteries provided by the scooter manufacturers, Amazon dealers, or eBay sellers. All of our battery packs are backed by a one year warranty. Compare our batteries to the shoddy, cheap, and unreliable batteries sold by our competition and you will see why Monster Scooter Parts is the right choice. Universal Power Group (UPG): UB1250 Razor: W20136401003

media.alt_text: 12 Volt 5 Ah Battery for the Razor MX125 Dirt Rocket with visible red and white wires, close-up views of connectors, and a compact, sealed black box design.
